subject: Re: Flight times
body:
weather for new york?,, I'd prefer not to land at teterboro


----- Original Message ----
From: "LVJET@aol.com" <LVJET@aol.com>
To: JEEPROJECT@YAHOO.COM
Cc: kellens@earthlink.net; bill@bhjets.com; DrJet@tmo.blackberry.net; JETCARE@aol.com
Sent: Sunday, February 25, 2007 8:37:10 PM
Subject: Flight times


Paris - Dubai - 6+16min (+38 kts wind).
Dubai - Cairo 3+47min. (-95 kts wind).
Cairo - Tel Aviv 1+00 (+ 57 kts wind).
Dubai to Tel Aviv not possible, have to enter Dubai from Jordan or Egypt.
Dubai - Amman (Jordan) 3+24min (-99 kts wind).
Amman - Tel Aviv +22 min.
Tel Aviv - Paris 4+44min (-51 kts wind).
 
Dubai - Paris  8+14min (-77 kts headwind) need fuel stop at this time.
 
Dubai  to Newark ,, will require two fuel stops due to current headwinds, still researching best possible route.
